items.title: Keldon Johnson stayed strong through his playoff struggles until his perseverance paid off with a big 4Q in the biggest game of his life:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Keldon Johnson stayed strong through his playoff struggles until his perseverance paid off with a big 4Q in the biggest game of his life:

“I knew as long as I just stayed engaged...it would pay off. I couldn't write it any other way than how it went today.”

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: How Spurs' Keldon Johnson's big fourth quarter made up for his 'hard playoff'
media.description: The NBA's Sixth Man of the Year got things rolling again in late in Game 7 after struggling for much of the postseason.

items.title: Champagnie was huge tonight. Keldon Johnson and Luke Kornet made crucial plays in the fourth quarter. Harper is a rising star. And the Spurs dominated on the offensive glass.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Champagnie was huge tonight. Keldon Johnson and Luke Kornet made crucial plays in the fourth quarter. Harper is a rising star. And the Spurs dominated on the offensive glass.

Game 7 on the road vs. defending champions, and they met the moment. Watching Wemby on the NBA's ultimate stage starts now.

items.title: Now playing on the Keldon Johnson Game 7 boom box:
items.author: Mike Finger
items.body_excerpt:
Now playing on the Keldon Johnson Game 7 boom box:

“It Wasn’t Me.”

items.author: NBA.com
items.body_excerpt: Keldon Johnson and Dylan Harper Quick Postgame Moments After Game 6 Victory NBA.com

items.title: Keldon Johnson's rebound after the Harper miss with the Spurs trailing 87-73 was a big one. That extra possession led to Castle sinking a 3, with Keldon picking up the assist.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Keldon Johnson's rebound after the Harper miss with the Spurs trailing 87-73 was a big one. That extra possession led to Castle sinking a 3, with Keldon picking up the assist. 

Big-time energy sequence from the struggling Sixth Man of the Year.

items.title: Keldon Johnson in about two minutes:
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Keldon Johnson in about two minutes:

- Fast break bucket after Holmgren got coffin cornered

- 3 from Wemby

- Offensive rebound and dime to one of the deepest Castle 3s of the year

- screaming

items.title: Yeah, there's a first bump, and then there's what Keldon Johnson just did to Chet Holmgren
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Yeah, there's a first bump, and then there's what Keldon Johnson just did to Chet Holmgren

Chet gonna have a tomato on his chest after that one.

items.title: [Highlight] A hyped up Keldon Johnson gets Chet out the way for the dunk
items.author: Large_banana_hammock

items.title: Game 5s are huge, Keldon Johnson reminds us this morning: “This is the biggest game of the season right here tonight…It's going to be a dog fight. It's going to be tough, but I feel like we are built for the moment and we are built for these times and I feel like we'll show it to
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt: Game 5s are huge, Keldon Johnson reminds us this morning: “This is the biggest game of the season right here tonight…It's going to be a dog fight. It's going to be tough, but I feel like we are built for the moment and we are built for these times and I feel like we'll show it tonight.”

items.title: Cason Wallace help defense steals the ball from Keldon Johnson then gives KJ a bump. When Victor Wembanyama comes in for the steal attempt, he gets a bump too!
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: Cason Wallace help defense steals the ball from Keldon Johnson then gives KJ a bump. When Victor Wembanyama comes in for the steal attempt, he gets a bump too!

items.title: The end of quarter/start of quarter lineups nad matchups fascinate me. Chet on Wemby, Jaylin Williams on Keldon Johnson. Just trying to move pieces around the board.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt: The end of quarter/start of quarter lineups nad matchups fascinate me. Chet on Wemby, Jaylin Williams on Keldon Johnson. Just trying to move pieces around the board.
